pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic dataset: GeoJSON created programmatically in setup_task.sh from hardcoded coordinates representing real US state capitals
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates the data dynamically using cat/heredoc at lines 18-43

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically-generated GeoJSON file containing exactly 17 US state capitals with real approximate coordinates. All 5 claimed ground-truth nearest-neighbor pairs (Denver-Cheyenne at 1.407°, Bismarck-Pierre at 2.459°, Lincoln-Topeka at 1.933°, Sacramento-Carson City at 1.465°, and Salem-Olympia at 2.097°) are verified as correct nearest neighbors when calculated from the coordinates. The coordinates match actual state capitals within ~0.005° average deviation. The minimum inter-capital distance is 1.407° (Denver-Cheyenne), well above the 0.1° threshold. However, the verifier script checks only 3 of the 5 pairs listed in metadata.
